channel.title: Binary Explotation on abund4nt
channel.description: Recent content in Binary Explotation on abund4nt

item.title: buffer overflow 1
item.description: We are provided with the compiled vuln binary, the source code vuln.c and a remote instance to connect to. #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h> #include <string.h> #include <unistd.h> #include <sys/types.h> #include "asm.h" #define BUFSIZE 32 #define FLAGSIZE 64 void win() { char buf[FLAGSIZE]; FILE *f = fopen("flag.txt","r"); if (f == NULL) { printf("%s %s", "Please create 'flag.txt' in this directory with your", "own debugging flag.\n"); exit(0); } fgets(buf,FLAGSIZE,f); printf(buf); } void vuln(){ char buf[BUFSIZE]; gets(buf); printf("Okay, time to return.
